channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping by lampost 09 in Merganser Gardens SE28 0DH, 12th March
item.description:
Fly tipping and health and safety risk to passers by

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldfinch Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matterace and other household items, 12th March
item.description:
Dumped at front of Belfast Court

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Belfast Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 12th March
item.description:
Part of wooden arm chair, and other items

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked vehicles on pavement, 12th March
item.description:
Cars parking on pavement in Heron Crescent dog walkers and pedestrians are unable to walk on public walkway due to cars parked on pavements there are residential flats with over 60s who are having to walk in the road due to these cars being parked on pavement - been an ongoing issue since the flats were boarded up - occasionally we get traffic enforcement round but not regularly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-48, Heron Crescent, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large sofa and large wooden pallet, 12th March
item.description:
Reported as completed on Tuesday but never touched also, no one bulky item has been collected from Tuesday around Windus/Kyverdale

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several in the region of 2-38, 12th March
item.description:
Several potholes in the stretch of road, getting worse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Bartholomew Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 12th March
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Park Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 12th March
item.description:
Dead fox outside my house, under the neighbours back car wheel. Seen on 09/03/2026. Still there today 10/03/2026 in the same position, starting to rot.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Quilter Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full, 12th March
item.description:
Bin full
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chichester Road NW6, 12th March
item.description:
A mattress and a box were dumped yesterday - between 8am and 2pm

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag (Estates)

item.title: Fly tipping on Westdale Road's grass bank, 12th March
item.description:
Last night some bags of rubbish and some plastic wrapping were dumped on Westdale Road's grass bank, opposite Ranwell Passage. I've had a look in one of the bags, and it looks like the rubbish is from one of the shop on Herbert Road. You might be able to identify the shop by the hand writing in one of the photos.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westdale Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement opposite 6A Westdale Road, 12th March
item.description:
A television and a large plastic toy have been dumped on the pavement opposite 6A Westdale Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westdale Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal Parking Blocking Access, 12th March
item.description:
Subject Illegal Parking Blocking Access Hello, As you can see in the attached picture, people are using this area for parking, even though parking is not allowed here.Woodsford building Portland Street London The vehicles are blocking the entrance, which makes it impossible to remove the rubbish and access the area properly. Could you please send local officers to address this issue? Thank you for your assistance. Kind regards,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags and cushion on cadet drive, 12th March
item.description:
Dumped items on cadet drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cadet Drive, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lit bollard detached, 12th March
item.description:
The lit bollard on the traffic island outside Sainsbury's Local has been knocked down again. (Please could someone remind the contractor to replace it so that the arrow is visible to oncoming traffic this time, too!)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All lights are not working, 12th March
item.description:
The pass way between 48 lynmouth road to lampard grove opposite 26 ,all the lights are off and pitch dark already 2 weeks please sort it out ASAP it's very dangerous
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple deep potholes in both direction along this part of Vera Avenue, 12th March
item.description:
Multiple potholes around the area marked on Vera Avenue in both directions and central elongated potholes between each lane
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vera Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two deepening potholes on Winchmore Hill Road, 12th March
item.description:
Two deepening potholes on Winchmore Hill Road when travelling north east (away from Southgate Tube Station) as you go past Marks and Spencer). Have been there for over two months and are dangerously deep
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchmore Hill Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole at junction to right side of lane just before give way line when turning right from Bush Hill to Bush Hill Road., 12th March
item.description:
This pothole has been there for over two months. In addition to the pothole at the give way line at the junction turning from Bush Hill onto Bush Hill Road, there is a deepening ridge across the different road surfaces some 10 meters before this junction on Bush Hill going onto Bush Hill Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bush Hill Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thorn Buses traffic controller box, 12th March
item.description:
Pit located behind the traffic signal controller is covered by thorn bushes- require bushes to be cut back behind controller
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
